image_prompt: A humorous, cartoonish scene depicting a fish out of water, but instead of struggling, it's comically holding a tiny oxygen tank and mask, looking quite comfortable and nonchalant. Above the fish, in a thought bubble or as a floating sign, the Portuguese sentence "Você precisa de ar para respirar." is displayed in a light, airy font. The background is a vibrant, stylized underwater scene, with the fish incongruously on a small, dry rock. Bright colors, playful style, high resolution.
short_sentence: Você precisa de ar para respirar.
caption: Verdades que a gente nem para pra pensar, mas são essenciais! 🌬️ Literalmente, não dá pra viver sem! Qual a sua verdade óbvia favorita? #Respirar #CoisasÓbvias #Vida #ArPuro #Essencial
